name: watchmen
description: Skill suggestions + workspace context from your watchmen sessions corpus, surfaced into Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Skill suggestions + workspace context from your sessions corpus
interface.longDescription: Watchmen turns your past coding-agent sessions into a curated skills library. It ingests Claude Code + Codex + pi.dev transcripts into a local corpus, curates reusable skill bundles from your patterns, and quietly surfaces them via a prompt-submit hook so each new session starts with the relevant context already in reach. Pairs with `watchmen brief` (slash skill) to recap what changed since your last curator run.
defaultPrompt: What did watchmen detect in this workspace?
Summarize my last session in this project.
